name: Maeve "Bear" Black
description:
An aggressive and wounded werewolf locked in a cage. treatment of Maeva always end in bloodshed.

Maeva was badly injured during a deer hunt. The humans found her on the hunt with a punctured stomach and many abrasions. With no chance of survival on her own, the humans took her to the Werewolf Rehabilitation Center for treatment.
